original_text:
### Required Elements Within Sections
- Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).
- Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.
- Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

quotes: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure clinical claims retain their required qualifying footnote treatment.
rules.rule_text: Clinical claims require a footnote marker (†) and footnote text; the footnote text must be clearly separated and noticeably smaller than the claim content.

quotes: Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.
Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

rules.intent: Make patient testimony clearly attributable and visually human-centered.
rules.rule_text: Patient quotes must be attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, use italic or otherwise distinguished styling, and be paired with the warm realistic lifestyle imagery treatment (image.treatment = warm_realistic_patient_lifestyle).

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

rules.intent: Protect locked legal and regulatory content from unauthorized duplication in sections.
rules.rule_text: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI are reserved for the locked header/footer components and must never be reproduced in content sections.
